meta.source: Real events from public NHL.com / Wikipedia / CBS / CBC recaps. Per-shot coords (x,y in rink feet, net at x=89) and clock seconds are REPRESENTATIVE; replace with NHL API play-by-play (gamecenter/{gameId}/play-by-play) for exact values.
meta.note: This file is the real-event backbone only. Non-scoring shot attempts that populate the live shot map should be added from the NHL API pull or synthesized with the existing xG/spatial model (see scripts/generate-seed.mjs).

enriched.real: Scoring events, final score, rosters, P1 shot totals (public recaps).
enriched.modeled: Non-scoring shot attempts, box-score columns beyond G/A/S, goalie net-zone save maps, and 5-on-5 tracking. Clearly labeled CV-generated in the UI.

events.infraction: Too many men on the ice
events.detail: Bench minor — sets up the Vegas power play
Deflected in off a Carolina stick; 16s after Hertl (Vegas record fastest two playoff goals)
Slap shot completes natural hat trick in 6:10 — fastest hat trick in Cup Final history
Andersen pulled after 2 periods (4 GA); Bussi starts the 3rd
Puts Carolina on the power play; Marner draws the short-handed penalty shot while killing it
Short-handed penalty shot stopped — pivotal miss
Start of the fastest 3 goals in Cup Final history (39s)
Makes it 4-3 at 12:18 remaining — completes the 39s burst
Late-period penalty Carolina turns into the 6-on-4 tying goal
6-on-4 (power play + pulled goalie); jammed rebound home with 1:42 left
2OT winner — low slap banked off end boards, in off Bussi's skate. Lowest-xG goal of the game.
